name: 5'x7' Wool Handtufted Area Rug Tan - Threshold™
description:
Add lovely style to any room in your home with this Wool Handtufted Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular hand-tufted area rug showcases a floral pattern in tan on a checkered backdrop for a charming look that blends well with any decor aesthetic. Featuring a wool construction for soft underfoot comfort, the medium-pile area rug is ideal for use in a variety of areas within your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
